metadata.title: synaply - Funda Amagama kunye no-AI
metadata.description: Iqonga lokufunda ulwimi elitshabalalisa amagama, elisebenza ngokuzenzekelayo kwaye lisebenzisa i-AI
metadata.og_description: Fumana amagama amatsha, wakhe uluhlu lwakho lwamagama, kwaye ufunde ngokukhawuleza.

hero.title: Funda amagama amatsha ngobulumko
hero.subtitle: Iqonga lakho lokufunda ulwimi elisebenzisa i-AI elenzelwe ukwandisa isigama sakho ngokufanelekileyo.

ai_powered.title: I-AI eNxibelelanayo
ai_powered.description: Fumana iinguqulelo ezichanekileyo kwaye ungasoze ulibale umxholo usebenzisa amandla we-AI.

custom_lists.title: Uluhlu Lwakho
custom_lists.description: Dala uluhlu lwamagama alungele iimfuno zakho kwaye ulandele inkqubela-phambili yakho.

smart_repetition.title: Ukuphindaphinda Okukhaliphileyo
smart_repetition.description: Sisebenzisa i-algorithm ye-Spaced Repetition ukunceda amagama anamathele kwinkumbulo yakho.

welcome.title: Wamkelekile ku-synaply
welcome.description: Masikuncede ufunde iilwimi ezintsha ngobulumko kwaye ngokukhawuleza.

topics.title: Izihloko
topics.empty_state: Awukabi nazo izihloko okwangoku. Dala eyakho yokuqala!

spaced_repetition.title: Ukuphindaphinda Okukhaliphileyo
spaced_repetition.description: I-system yethu ikunceda ukhumbule amagama ngokusebenzisa indlela ye-Spaced Repetition. Amagama uza kuwaphonononga ngamaxesha achanekileyo ukwenzela ukuba angashiywa yinkumbulo yakho.
spaced_repetition.algorithm_info: Sisebenzisa i-algorithm eguquguqukayo esekwe kwimpumelelo yakho kwixesha elidlulileyo.
